overview: An academic risk monitoring system that uses predictive analytics to identify students at risk of dropping out. Features beautiful dark-themed dashboards, student risk profiles, intervention tracking, and advisor/admin views — all secured with Internet Identity login.
features: Dark-themed analytics dashboard with dropout risk charts
Student risk profiles with attendance, grade, and engagement scores
Intervention tracking — create, assign, and monitor advisor plans
Risk-level filtering and search across all students
Pre-loaded mock data with 40+ sample students at various risk levels
